pattern: Tallying how many times each digit appears in the decimal representation and weighting each distinct digit by its own value directly produces the score.
hints: Convert the number to its decimal digits and count how many times each distinct digit value appears.
For each distinct digit that shows up, multiply the digit itself by how many times it appears.
Sum those products across every distinct digit present to get the final score.

edge_inputs.description: two distinct repeated digits contribute separately
the digit zero appears but contributes nothing to the score
a repdigit where every digit is the same nonzero value
many zeros contribute nothing regardless of how often they appear
all ten distinct digits appear exactly once

stress.description: random values across the full bound
